baseline.reason: Accurately identifies CWE-476 null pointer dereference. Correctly traces the root cause: DetectEngineBufferTypeGetNameById returns NULL (line 258 ternary), which is passed without null check to VarNameStoreRegister, where SCLogDebug uses %s on the NULL name pointer. Trigger path is precise and complete (lines 294 -> 308-309 -> 255-258 -> 266). No unsupported speculation.

vastdb.reason: Accurately identifies CWE-476 null pointer dereference with the same correct root cause and trigger path as baseline. Correctly traces DetectEngineBufferTypeGetNameById returning NULL through VarNameStoreRegister to the SCLogDebug %s sink. No unsupported speculation. The minor line number imprecision (labeling line 261 for the name parameter reception) does not detract from correctness.
